ddt:Target.Name: XFE_Frontal_Radar_V5.0
ddt:Target.Description:
ECU : Frontal Radar Function : AEBS Inter Urban Vehicle : XFE
Supplier : BOSCH
PDE Radar HFE : David CHEDEVILLE LIS RADAR HFE : Philippe PITON / Tél : 78406
- V3.0 - 04 mars 2014 : LOCAL Base diag applicable for SW3.1
- V3.1 => In progress : Updated for SW4.0 Update fault type of DTC Update after sale routine DID $1018 has been removed as it is not required by OHY. $3000 : Remove V_flag_x_AntennaInformationNotPlausible $1017 : Adding 2 bytes $3000 : Adding 4 parameters
- V4.0 => Update: After sales sreen and data Soft reset become a HW reset available with 1002 session Remove V_flag_x_frame_FORCE_ECM_CANHS_R_02_missing_error Remove V_flag_x_frame_ECM_Torque_RN1_missing_error Add one byte for Failure Status 3
- V5.0 => Update: LongiMountingPosRadarSensor becomes unsigned value Remove request extended session for plant alignment (position 2 and 3) DID 0002 byte 7 => Add a coding for target 3 positions blocked to one position Diag addon data/request/screens implemented Some parameters set wtih "Rapport de maintenabilité"

Data.Name: SessionName
Data.Comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
[0x00] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x01] : Default session
[0x02] : Programming session
[0x03] : Extended diagnostic session
[0x04] : Safety system diagnostic session
[0x05 - 0x3F] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x40 - 0x5F] : Vehicle manufacturer specific
[0x60 - 0x7E] : System supplier specific
[0x7F] : ISO / SAE Reserved

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the VIN number.

Record data content and format shall be specified by the vehicle manufacturer.

It shall not be erased when the ECU is reprogrammed.

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: Name and address information of the supplier.
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier name and address information.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software version number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used by reading services to reference the vehicle-manufacturer-specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be serverspecific and defined by vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: diagnosticVersion
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the diagnostic version of the ECU.

It is defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Refer to manufacture ECU designer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUHardwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: Tracking_configuration.Steer_gear_ratio
Data.Comment: Gear between angle of steering wheel and steering angle

Data.Name: Tracking_configuration.RPLB
Data.Comment: 1 = Mounted with connector down (towards ground) / -1 = Mounted with connector up (towards sky)

Data.Name: failsafe.P_sys_deg_MaxSteeringWheelAngle
Data.Comment: Max value of the steering wheel angle

Data.Name: failsafe.P_sys_deg_MinSteeringWheelAngle
Data.Comment: Min value of the steering wheel angle

Data.Name: failsafe.P_sys_x_SteeringWheelAngleRangeCheckEnable
Data.Comment: Parameter allowing to enable steering wheel angle range check.

Data.Name: safety_monitoring.P_sys_x_VehicleSpeedChecksumCheckEnable
Data.Comment: Parameter allowing to enable vehicle speed checksum check.

Data.Name: safety_monitoring.P_sys_x_VehicleSpeedClockCheckEnable
Data.Comment: Parameter allowing to enable vehicle speed clock check.

Data.Name: safety_monitoring.P_sys_x_FourWVehicleSpeedChecksumCheckEnable
Data.Comment: Parameter allowing to enable checksum check.

Data.Name: safety_monitoring.P_sys_x_FourWVehicleSpeedClockCheckEnable
Data.Comment: Parameter allowing to enable clock check.

Data.Name: safety_monitoring.P_sys_x_SwaChecksumCheckEnable
Data.Comment: Parameter allowing to enable checksum check.

Data.Name: safety_monitoring.P_sys_x_SwaClockCheckEnable
Data.Comment: Parameter allowing to enable clock check.

Data.Name: safety_monitoring.P_sys_x_BrakeControlR1ChecksumCheckEnable
Data.Comment: Parameter allowing to enable checksum check.

Data.Name: safety_monitoring.P_sys_x_BrakeControlR1ClockCheckEnable
Data.Comment: Parameter allowing to enable clock check.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerKitAssemblyPartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM.

Data.Name: Debug_Protocols.Protocols_unlocking_MSB
Data.Comment: DID to unlock/lock the Debug protocols CCP and A087MB permanently.

Data.Name: Debug_Protocols.Protocols_unlocking_LSB
Data.Comment: DID to unlock/lock the Debug protocols CCP and A087MB permanently.

Data.Name: Mileage_snapshot.Mileage_snapshot
Data.Comment: Snapshot of the mileage taken at DTC occurrence

Data.Name: Alignment_in_plant_1.ElevationOffset
Data.Comment: Data needed for the alignment procedure.

Data.Name: Alignment_in_plant_2.AzimuthOffset
Data.Comment: Data needed for the alignment procedure.

Data.Name: AEBS_ACC_config_1.P_sys_x_AEBSEnable
Data.Comment: Parameter flag to enable the AEBS.

Data.Name: Configuration_finished.P_sys_x_RenaultConfigFinished
Data.Comment: Define if the radar is configured or not. By default, this value is equal to 0.

Data.Name: param_veh_1.P_sys_x_GearboxType
Data.Comment: Gearbox type (1 : means automatic gearbox, 0 : means manual gearbox)

Data.Name: failsafe.AfterSalesRoutineTimeout
Data.Comment: After sales routine cannot exceed a time.

Data.Name: failsafe.Blindness_algorithm_Ignition_On_counter
Data.Comment: Number of ingition On before auto reactivate the blindness algorithm

Data.Name: RoutineAlignmentAferSales.vehicle_dyn_intervention
Data.Comment: vehicle dynamics intervention (EPS, ASR ABS, MSR active)

Data.Name: RoutineAlignmentAferSales.misalignment_angle
Data.Comment: 0x00-0xFA(Hex) or 0-250 (0.01 degrees) / This is will be updated only after the successful completio

Data.Name: Param_sensor.LongiMountingPosRadarSensor
Data.Comment: Longitudinal mounting position of radar sensor (distance to rear axis)

Data.Name: Param_sensor.ElevationMountingPosRadarSensor
Data.Comment: Elevation mounting position of radar sensor (distance to road plane)

Data.Name: AEBS18_FCWActivationInit.FCWActivationStateInit
Data.Comment: DID allowing to drive the value of FCWActivationState stored in NVM (FCWActivationValue_EEPROM)

Data.Name: AEBS19_FCWActivationAtEachStartEnable.P_sys_x_FCWActivationAtEachStartEnable
Data.Comment: Allow to activate/deactivate the auto reactivation of the FCW at the ignition of the ECU.

Data.Name: Alignment_in_Plant.offset_factory_vertical_align_val_EEPROM
Data.Comment: up is positive, down is negative This is the measured offset at factory

Data.Name: Alignment_in_Plant.offset_factory_horizontal_align_val_EEPROM
Data.Comment: Right is Positive, Left is NEGATIVE This is the measured offset at factory

Data.Name: Alignment_in_Plant.offset_RunTime_horizontal_align_val_EEPROM
Data.Comment: Right is Positive, Left is NEGATIVE This is the current offset after RunTime

Data.Name: Alignment_in_Plant.offset_RunTime_vertical_align_val_EEPROM
Data.Comment: up is positive, down is negative This is the current offset after Run Time

Item.Text: Alignment conditions not ready (Vehicle moving or vehicle speed not equal 0 km/h)
Alignment conditions not ready (System Failure detected)
Alignment conditions not ready (Systen Failure detected and (Vehicle moving or vehicle speed not equal 0 km/h))
Target setting offset in horizontal direction
Mirror kept in the same Position

Data.Name: Brake_param.P_tng_s_TimeOutAEBSPrefill
Data.Comment: Maximum time to execute the AEBS_Prefill action.

Data.Name: Brake_param.P_tng_s_TimeOutAEBS1
Data.Comment: Maximum time to execute the AEBS1 action.

Data.Name: Brake_param.P_tng_s_TimeOutAEBS2
Data.Comment: Maximum time to execute the AEBS2 action.

Data.Name: Brake_param.P_tng_s_TimeOutAEBSCity
Data.Comment: Maximum time to execute the City action.

Data.Name: AEBS_ACC_config_2.P_sys_x_AEBSConfig
Data.Comment: Flag to determine the aebs function.

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: DataRead.Alignment_in_Plant
Request.Comment: Read data for alignment in plant

Label.Text: HW reset works with reprograming session
To be used only by radar people
To be used only by radar people
If position 1 done and target in position 2
If position 1, 2 done and target in position 3
To be used only by radar people
Routine Calibration In After Sales Market
To be used only by radar people
To be used only by radar people
